consignor.motivation: Consignor 'Electrolux Appliances AB' with country 'Sweden' from certificate matches invoice seller 'Electrolux Appliances AB' in header and country 'Sweden' (rule 4.1.1, 4.1.4).

consignee.certificate_value: ELECTROLUX DAYANIKLI TUKETIM MAMULLERI SANAYI VE TICARET A.S., Türkiye
consignee.invoice_value: ELECTROLUX DAYANIKLI TUKETIM MAMULLERI SANAYI VE TICARET A.S., TÜRKIYE
consignee.motivation: Consignee 'Electrolux Dayanikli... Ticaret A.S.' with country 'Türkiye' from certificate matches invoice buyer field and country 'TÜRKIYE' (rule 4.2.0.2, 4.2.3).

goods_description.certificate_value: SPARE PARTS FOR : DOMESTIC APPLIANCES FLOORCARE CONSUMABLES AND ACCESSORIES
goods_description.motivation: General goods description in certificate verified by explicit invoice reference to invoice no 60270701 dated 12.02.2026 (rule 4.3.5).

quantity.invoice_value: Gross weight: 1,160.032 KGM; Net weight: 975.813 KGM
quantity.motivation: Net weight 975.813 kg matches, but gross weight differs (certificate 1380.000 kg vs invoice 1160.032 kg) which is an explicit contradiction (rule 4.4.3).

origin.certificate_value: China, Türkiye, Poland, Germany, Hungary, Hong Kong, Thailand, Spain, Italy, Sweden, Slovakia, Netherlands, Slovenia, Bosnia and Herzegovina
origin.motivation: All certificate origins (CN, TR, PL, DE, HU, HK, TH, ES, IT, SE, SK, NL, SI, BA) explicitly present in invoice origin column per item (rule 4.5.1).

overall_assessment.decision_summary: Quantity gross weight mismatch leads to NOT_IDENTICAL.
overall_assessment.human_explanation: Vikten för gross weight skiljer sig mellan certifikat och faktura, vilket innebär att dokumenten inte är identiska.
